_meta.description: Complete source database: 15 national analysts + 320+ beat writers across all 32 teams. All platforms tracked: Twitter, podcast RSS, YouTube, Substack, websites.
_meta.note: Beat writer entries appended as research agents complete. Analysts section is final.

nationalAnalysts.name: Daniel Jeremiah

podcast.name: NFL: Move the Sticks with Daniel Jeremiah & Bucky Brooks
podcast.transcripts: iHeart episode pages have full auto-transcripts — fetch individual episode URLs

nationalAnalysts.notes: Former NFL scout. Publishes 3+ mock drafts per season with genuine scouting intel. One of two most-sourced analysts nationally. iHeart episode pages have FULL transcripts — best text source.

nationalAnalysts.name: Dane Brugler

podcast.name: Prospects to Pros with Dane Brugler & Lance Zierlein

nationalAnalysts.notes: Author of 'The Beast' — most comprehensive pre-draft guide. YouTube channel @TAFootballShow has auto-captions. Paywalled at The Athletic.

nationalAnalysts.name: Peter Schrager
nationalAnalysts.outlet: ESPN (left NFL Network/GMFB March 31 2025, joined ESPN April 1 2025)

podcast.name: The Schrager Hour
podcast.notes: Launched Sept 2025 with Peyton Manning's Omaha Productions and ESPN

nationalAnalysts.notes: CRITICAL: Left NFL Network/Good Morning Football. Now at ESPN. Mocks 'based on what I'm hearing' — strong sourcing. MNF sideline reporter.

nationalAnalysts.name: Ian Rapoport

podcast.name: NFL: The Insiders
podcast.transcripts: iHeart episode pages have full auto-transcripts — same system as Move the Sticks

nationalAnalysts.notes: Primary breaking news reporter for NFL Network. Not a draft analyst but covers all transactions. iHeart transcripts confirmed available.

nationalAnalysts.name: Tom Pelissero
nationalAnalysts.notes: Co-host of The Insiders. Regular Rich Eisen Show fill-in. Strong agent and front office contacts.

nationalAnalysts.name: Adam Schefter

podcast.name: The Adam Schefter Podcast
podcast.transcripts: Rephonic has transcripts for most (not all) episodes — search by keyword

nationalAnalysts.notes: ESPN's primary NFL insider. 442+ episodes. Rephonic keyword-searchable transcripts available.

nationalAnalysts.name: Albert Breer
nationalAnalysts.notes: Runs MMQB franchise at SI. Weekly column. Strong front office sourcing. Boston radio regular (Toucher & Hardy, 98.5 The Sports Hub).

nationalAnalysts.name: Todd McShay
nationalAnalysts.notes: CRITICAL: Now at The Ringer, NOT ESPN. Launched Oct 2024. Has Big Board database and newsletter at The Ringer.

nationalAnalysts.name: Charlie Campbell
nationalAnalysts.notes: Led all NFL media for mock draft accuracy 2024, 2022, 2019, 2017. ALL CONTENT IS TEXT — no transcripts needed, just scrape pages directly. Independent site, no paywall.

nationalAnalysts.name: Lance Zierlein

podcast.name: Prospects to Pros with Dane Brugler & Lance Zierlein

radio.notes: Morning drive co-host. Texas Radio Hall of Fame 2024.

nationalAnalysts.notes: NFL.com analyst since 2014. Writes 500+ prospect profiles per season. Fills in on Move the Sticks regularly.

nationalAnalysts.name: Nick Shook

podcast.name: NFL Daily with Gregg Rosenthal (regular panelist)

nationalAnalysts.notes: NFL.com writer since 2014. Publishes mock drafts. Around the NFL contributor.

nationalAnalysts.name: Charles Davis
nationalAnalysts.outlet: NFL Network / NFL on CBS (transitioning to CBS lead CFB analyst 2026)

podcast.notes: No dedicated podcast. Regular guest on team podcasts.

nationalAnalysts.notes: NFL Media analyst since 2006. Publishes mock drafts on NFL.com. Transitioning to CBS lead college football role in 2026.

nationalAnalysts.name: Matt Miller

substack.name: The Draft Scout
substack.notes: Independent newsletter ALONGSIDE ESPN role — rare. News, rankings, mock drafts.

nationalAnalysts.notes: Joined ESPN 2021. Formerly Bleacher Report lead draft writer 2010-2021. Has independent Substack thedraftscout.com — most accessible free content. Top 600 rankings published annually.

nationalAnalysts.name: Jordan Reid

podcast.notes: No dedicated podcast. Guest on team/regional shows.

nationalAnalysts.notes: Re-signed ESPN multi-year deal Jan 2025. Former football coach (NCCU). Publishes top 350 rankings and 7-round mocks on ESPN.com/ESPN+.

nationalAnalysts.name: Pete Prisco

podcast.name: Pick Six NFL Podcast / Pushing the Pile (regular contributor)
podcast.notes: Regular contributor, not primary host. Daily during NFL season.

nationalAnalysts.notes: 30+ year NFL veteran. Multiple mock drafts per season on CBS Sports. CBS Sports HQ contributor.

beatWriters.notes: Longest-tenured Falcons beat writer. Bill Nunn Jr. Award winner 2024.

beatWriters.notes: Daily Mon-Fri Falcons content. Founded Falcfans.com 2002-2019.

beatWriters.notes: Columnist since 1994. Covered Panthers since 1995 inception. 24x APSE winner.

beatWriters.notes: Charlotte native. Daily Panthers coverage Mon-Fri.

beatWriters.notes: 10 seasons covering NFL. Former Panthers.com senior writer.

beatWriters.notes: Panthers beat writer. PFWA member.

beatWriters.notes: Founded NewOrleans.Football Feb 2020. Independent subscription site. THE Saints insider.

beatWriters.notes: 24+ years covering Saints. Times-Picayune columnist and WVUE-TV analyst.

beatWriters.notes: Senior Digital Media Contributor for Saints.com. Hosts official Saints podcast.

beatWriters.notes: Covered Saints 19 seasons. Now covers sports memorabilia at The Athletic.

podcast.name: Guest on Pewter Report Podcast regularly

beatWriters.notes: 30+ years covering Buccaneers. Publisher and VP. Streams live on YouTube and X.

beatWriters.notes: Tampa native. Lead PFF NFL Draft analyst. Deep Bucs analytical coverage. Regular Pewter Report guest.

beatWriters.notes: Buccaneers.com staff writer. 'Behind the Buccaneers' longform series.

beatWriters.notes: Buccaneers Insider. Former Tampa Tribune Bucs beat writer.

beatWriters.notes: Tampa Bay Times Bucs data reporter.

beatWriters.notes: 27th season covering Cardinals. Emmy winner. Most prolific Cardinals team-side reporter.

beatWriters.notes: 50+ years at Arizona Republic. Now sports columnist + Cardinals beat.

beatWriters.notes: Current Republic beat star. Known for aggressive press conference questioning of Cardinals brass.

beatWriters.notes: Cardinals beat reporter and editor. Co-host Cardinals Corner podcast. Full-time beat since 2021.

beatWriters.notes: 47+ years covering professional football. 41 Super Bowls. Now at PHNX Sports.

beatWriters.notes: 41-year career at Arizona Republic. Retired Feb 2023 after Super Bowl LVII. Historical value.

beatWriters.notes: 49ers beat (Niner Insider) for SF Chronicle. 25+ years. Regular Threads presence.

_beatWriterStatus: COMPLETE: 309 beat writers across all 32 teams. All 5 research agents finished.

_podcastTranscriptGuide.iHeart: Move the Sticks AND The Insiders episode pages have FULL auto-transcripts. Fetch https://www.iheart.com/podcast/[id]/episode/[episode-id]/ and extract 'Episode Transcript' section.
_podcastTranscriptGuide.Rephonic: Keyword-searchable transcripts for GMFB and Schefter. https://rephonic.com/podcasts/[show]
_podcastTranscriptGuide.ApplePodcasts: Auto-transcripts on iOS 17.4+. All shows distributed through Apple have transcripts.
_podcastTranscriptGuide.YouTube: Auto-captions available for: The Athletic Football Show (@TAFootballShow), Jets Final Drive (SNY), NFL Network clips
_podcastTranscriptGuide.WalterFootball: All written text — no transcripts needed. Scrape pages directly.
_podcastTranscriptGuide.Spotify: In-app transcripts for select shows. Cannot export text.
